mapper.select: SELECT a.appeal_id AS appealId, a.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, a.appeal_employee_id AS appealEmployeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, a.appeal_type AS appealType, a.title, a.status, a.review_result AS reviewResult, a.filed_at AS filedAt, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt FROM evaluation_appeal a JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = a.appeal_employee_id WHERE a.appeal_employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY a.filed_at DESC

SELECT l.score_modification_log_id AS scoreModificationLogId, l.score_evaluatee_id AS scoreEvaluateeId, ee.employee_name AS evaluateeName, l.score_modifier_id AS scoreModifierId, em.employee_name AS modifierName, l.score_original_score AS scoreOriginalScore, l.score_modified_score AS scoreModifiedScore, l.score_reason AS scoreReason, l.score_modified_at AS scoreModifiedAt FROM score_modification_log l JOIN employee ee ON ee.employee_id = l.score_evaluatee_id JOIN employee em ON em.employee_id = l.score_modifier_id ORDER BY l.score_modified_at DESC
